reviews.review_description:
Needs a little work for the floor being glitchy and the keyboard and computer need work  needs smaller hands more entities will be better for it I hope I helped 
.

developer_response.body: thank you for the review! if you are sticking to the floor, you might need to turn off battery saver on your headset. in these more recent updates, i added a new map and new entity so maybe you should try it out.

reviews.review_title: This is the best game ive played ever
reviews.review_description: Its so mystal, just magical how great it is

This game is so massive and beautiful even though people hate it like the banana dude who was in my lobby. Other then him the game was really really fun, great scary monsters, really cool and funny admins. Anyways love the game and will play it when the new update drops. Thanks for making such a good game! Thank you, Glacier.
When i first played with my friend it was only me and him in a public and it was really buggy with the computer. If it had more players and it wasnt buggy it would be better.

developer_response.body: thank you for the review! unfortunately, i cant control the amount of players in the game. the computer glitch can be easily avoidable if you don't switch the name and code tabs fast or spam them, and if it happens just restart your game, but i will try to look into fixing it.

reviews.review_description: No one's playing it, so it's not that fun and cool, but I liked it a ton a bunch of levels and a fun time.

developer_response.body: thank you for the review! i cant control the amount of players in the game and this game isn't well known, so that is why there isn't a lot of players.
